name: Bone a Fidos
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup nonfat dry milk (lightly spooned into the cup)
recipeInstructions:
------------------------------------GLAZE-----------------------------------
1. Beat together 1 large egg and 1 tablespoon milk.
2. Preheat oven to 300°F.
3. Sprinkle yeast over warm water (110°F if dry yeast, 100°F if compressed) and add sugar; let sit in a draft-free spot for 10-20 minutes or until full of bubbles. If not, discard the yeast as it's too old.
4. In a large bowl, mix dry ingredients. Add yeast mixture and 3 cups broth; stir to form dough. Knead briefly on floured surface; cover remaining dough with moist towel.
5. Roll dough into an 18 x 13 x 1/4-inch rectangle. Cut desired shapes using bone cutter or cookie cutter. Re-roll scraps and repeat with remaining dough.
6. Brush glaze evenly over cookies. Bake for 45-60 minutes or until brown and firm. Rotate sheets halfway through baking.
7. Cool on wire racks completely before storing in an airtight container at room temperature. Use immediately if refrigerated.
